ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the league the team is part of */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team's coach */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team the coach is part of */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "coach_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the league the season is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties by the team */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points against the team */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the performance data was last updated */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score_details" TEXT /* Detailed score information (e.g., quarter-by-quarter scores) */,
  "injury_report" TEXT /* Information about injuries during the game */,
  "player_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the opponent team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "score_details" TEXT /* Detailed score information (e.g., quarter-by-quarter scores) */,
  "injury_report" TEXT /* Information about injuries during the game */,
  "player_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "performance_details" TEXT /* Detailed performance information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team the player is part of */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
